metadata.name: Analyze Viewership Data for a Pilot Episode

description: A TV network needs a report on the viewership performance of a new show's pilot episode to decide whether to order a full season.

nodes.task_description: Gather all viewership data for the pilot episode across linear broadcast and on-demand streaming.

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles a complete dataset of viewership numbers.

nodes.task_description: Analyze viewer retention throughout the episode (minute-by-minute drop-off rate).

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a significant viewer drop-off after the first 10 minutes.

nodes.task_description: Compare the pilot's performance against historical data for successful shows in the same genre.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the pilot underperformed by 30% compared to the average successful drama.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary report with key metrics and a recommendation against ordering a full season.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a concise report with a clear, data-driven recommendation.
